summary: Comprehensive testing of HoneyGroove filter lock system (6 filters), Re-pollinate button, Newsletter status, and PWA localStorage key. All features verified working.

issues: Some 503 errors for image resources - does not affect functionality

context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified working. Filter system locked to exactly 6 filters (All, Now Spinning, ISO, Haul, Notes, For Sale/Trade). Mobile uses grid-cols-3 for 2x3 layout. Desktop uses md:flex md:flex-nowrap for 1x6 layout.

filter_bar_6_filters.details: Found exactly 6 filters: 🍯 All, 🐝 Now Spinning, 🔍 ISO, 📦 Haul, 📝 Notes, 🏷️ For Sale/Trade

mobile_layout_2x3.details: Filter bar uses grid-cols-3 class for 2 rows of 3 on mobile (390px viewport)

desktop_layout_1x6.details: Filter bar uses md:flex md:flex-nowrap md:justify-center for 1 row of 6 centered on desktop

now_spinning_filter.details: Now Spinning filter (data-testid='filter-NOW_SPINNING') clickable and active. Code confirms it includes NOW_SPINNING and RANDOMIZER post types (HivePage.js line 603)

for_sale_trade_filter.details: For Sale/Trade filter (data-testid='filter-listing') clickable. Shows empty state 'No 🏷️ For Sale/Trade posts yet.' when no matching posts. Code confirms it filters listing_sale and listing_trade (HivePage.js line 604)

repollinate_button.details: Re-pollinate 🐝 button visible on own profile page (data-testid='repollinate-btn'). Tooltip mentions $1.99 price for streak recovery.

repollinate_api.details: POST /api/repollinate/checkout returns Stripe checkout URL (https://checkout.stripe.com/...) and valid session_id (cs_...)

newsletter_status_api.details: GET /api/newsletter/status returns {subscribed: true, email: 'kmklodnicki@gmail.com'} - user is subscribed to Weekly Wax

newsletter_toggle.details: Newsletter toggle visible in Settings page (data-testid='newsletter-toggle') with data-state='checked'. Shows under 'The Weekly Wax' section with description 'get the honey groove newsletter in your inbox every week.'

empty_state_text.details: Empty state shows 'No 🏷️ For Sale/Trade posts yet.' for filtered results with no matches

pwa_localstorage_key.details: PWA banner uses 'honey_groove_installed' localStorage key (verified in PWAInstallBanner.js lines 7, 24, 31)
